name: chaos-substrate-local
description: Local marketplace for the Chaos Substrate Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: chaos-substrate
plugins.description: Persistent code knowledge memory with a layered feature hierarchy, change-plan decomposition, core-components area overviews, MCP feature-context explanations, and client-facing feature storyboards (with real-UI previews) for Rust, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, and Solidity projects.
